summary: Senior Machine Learning Engineer with 7+ years of experience in scalable AI infrastructure, generative AI, and MLOps. Proven track record of shipping production ML systems at high-growth companies. Strong background in LLM fine-tuning, RAG architectures, and real-time inference pipelines.

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Led development of a multi-agent RAG system serving 5M+ daily queries with p99 latency under 200ms.
Designed and shipped an LLM fine-tuning pipeline on AWS SageMaker, reducing hallucination rate by 40%.
Drove cross-functional collaboration with product and data teams to define model evaluation standards.

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Built embedding-based retrieval system (EBR) for product search, improving click-through rate by 18%.
Automated ML model deployment with CI/CD pipelines using Docker, Airflow, and AWS Lambda.
Reduced inference costs by $25K/month by migrating batch scoring jobs from GPU to optimized CPU clusters.

experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: Developed propensity-to-buy models using gradient boosting, increasing conversion by 12%.
Built real-time feature pipelines using Kafka and Spark Streaming for personalization at scale.
Designed A/B testing framework adopted by the entire analytics team.

recognition: Speaker – NeurIPS 2023 workshop on production LLM systems
Open Source Contributor – LangChain and FAISS, focused on retrieval performance
